description.value:
You extend your mind toward your target, attempting to discern the shape, texture, and color of their soul. Make a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} check using Soulsight Lore against the target's Level-Based DC (modified by any relevant modifiers).

Before learning the result, you may ask for any of the following types of information:

  • Demeanor towards you

  • Morality

  • Level

  • Magical ability

  • Curses they may be afflicted with

  • Other questions that are applicable at GM's discretion.

Critical Success: You are able to read the target's soul as if you were reading the book. Not only are you able to glean all of the information that you were seeking, but you learn it in exacting detail. For example, if one piece of information you seek is the level of the target, you will be told the exact numerical value of the target's level.

Success: You are able to read the target's soul, but some of it remains a mystery to you. You are able to learn half of the information you seek and with relative detail. For example, if the GM determines that you can learn the relative level of your target, they may tell you that the target is higher or lower level than you.

Failure: The target's soul is hidden to your advances. You fail to glean any information.

Critical Failure: The target's soul is an enigma to you. You learn half of the information you requested, but it is incorrect.

You can only See Soul on one target at a time.

As you grow as a Soulseer, you are able to glean more information from the soul of your target. For each Soulseer feat you have learned, you can ask to glean one additional piece of information from the target's soul.
